commit.subject: LU-10070 lod: SEL: split declare_instantiate_comp
commit.message:
LU-10070 lod: SEL: split declare_instantiate_comp

Future patches require the ability to know the striping for
a component before it is created, rather than only as part
of the creation.

This requires splitting lod_declare_instantiate_components.
The new function, lod_comp_prep_striping, is used in future
patches.

cray-bug-id: LUS-2528
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <paf@cray.com>
